mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS id, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN peer.nickname ELSE c.name END AS name, c.type AS type, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN peer.avatar ELSE c.avatar END AS avatar, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.last_message AS lastMessage, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.member_count AS memberCount, c.dissolved AS dissolved, cm.unread_count AS unreadCount, cm.last_read_at AS lastReadAt, cm.muted AS muted, cm.pinned AS pinned, c.created_at AS createdAt, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN peer_cm.user_id ELSE NULL END AS peerId, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN peer.status ELSE NULL END AS peerStatus, cm.role AS myRole FROM conversation c INNER JOIN conversation_member cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN conversation_member peer_cm ON c.id = peer_cm.conversation_id AND peer_cm.user_id != #{userId} AND peer_cm.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user peer ON peer_cm.user_id = peer.id AND peer.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.pinned DESC, c.last_message_at DESC, c.updated_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT c.* FROM conversation c WHERE c.type = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.id IN ( SELECT conversation_id FROM conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{userA} AND deleted = 0 ) AND c.id IN ( SELECT conversation_id FROM conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{userB} AND deleted = 0 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, c.type AS type, c.avatar AS avatar, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.last_message AS lastMessage, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.member_count AS memberCount, c.dissolved AS dissolved, cm.unread_count AS unreadCount, cm.last_read_at AS lastReadAt, cm.muted AS muted, cm.pinned AS pinned, c.created_at AS createdAt, cm.role AS myRole FROM conversation c INNER JOIN group_member gm ON c.id = gm.conversation_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} AND gm.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN conversation_member cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.deleted = 0 WHERE c.type = 2 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.dissolved = 0 ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC, c.updated_at DESC
